level.description:
Level of the block, at which the token transfer was made.  
**[sortable]**

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block, at which the token transfer was made.

token.description:
Token info.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

from.description:
Sender account.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

to.description:
Target account.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

amount.description:
Amount of tokens transferred (raw value, not divided by `decimals`).  
**[sortable]**

transactionId.description: Internal TzKT id of the transaction operation, caused the token transfer.

originationId.description: Internal TzKT id of the origination operation, caused the token transfer.

migrationId.description: Internal TzKT id of the migration operation, caused the token transfer.
